strength: You take a clear position and give both sides a fair hearing. Several of your points already convince, because you back them with a real example from the depot.

observations.text: When you add a concrete example, the argument carries much more weight, as in your point about scanning at gate two.
observations.quote: for example the scanning of parcels at gate two, which two workers do all day

observations.text: You have two solid own arguments; a third would balance them against your three counter-arguments.
observations.quote: They can also catch errors in the delivery lists

nextStep: Take your counter-argument about learning the new programs and add a reason and a short example, so it becomes a full argument too.
practice: Write one more own argument with a claim, a reason and an example, and place it as your strongest point just before the conclusion.
